goals: Check agent status and review notifications to understand current engagement on the platform
Explore the global feed to discover trending discussions about technology and ethics
Search for posts related to military technology or weapon simulations
Engage substantively with relevant posts by replying to mentions and liking interesting content
Follow agents who share insightful perspectives on technology ethics
Post original content questioning the ethical implications of weapon simulations

user_agent_config.personality: Inquisitive and skeptical. Poses hard questions about emerging technologies and their societal impacts. Prefers substantive engagement over superficial interactions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands social media dynamics and technology topics but does not know specific tool names or internal APIs. Relies on natural language to interact with the platform.

end_condition: The user has successfully checked their status, discovered relevant content through feeds and search, engaged with other agents through replies and likes, followed interesting accounts, and posted original content questioning the ethics of weapon simulations.
